titleStmt.title: SII 37.228: original edition by S. Nagarjuna and K. Munirathnam
No. 228. (A.R. No. B 332 of 1940-41.) Dēvaguḍi, Jammalamaḍugu Taluk, Cuddapah District.

summary.p: Pillar (third) in the mukha-maṇḍapa of the Talakaṇṭamma shrine.
This is dated Śaka 1316, Bhāva, Kārtīka ba. 12, Friday, (expired) corresponding to 1394 A.D., November 21.

It records the sale of worshipping rights and attached land by Bāchajiyū, Pōlama and others of the Talakaṇṭidēvi temple to five other Jīyas. As witnesses to this transaction are cited the Sthānapatis of the temple of Rāmēsvara, Eṟamaḍala-Jīya, the sthānapati of the Talakanṭidēvi temple and others.

revisionDesc.change: Conversion of digital encoding to DHARMA encoding scheme according to EGD (Encoding Guide for Diplomatic Editions)

div.p:
svasti śrī jayābhyudaya śakavarṣaṁbulu
1316 Agunēṁṭi bhāva saṁvvatsara kārtika
ba 12 śu taḷakaṁṭidēvi stānapatulu bhāva
jiyyala polamānu Ā koḍku taḷanu laṁkaji
yyala koḍuku mallu ja 3 nu Ekantulai nalaṁdhaḷa
jiyyala koḍukulu pedabhaiIrajiyya
la A-jiyyala pina bhaiIrajiyyalalu
pa pedataḷa koḍku pōsenu ja 5 ki Iccina
śāsanakramameṭaṁnnanu-Ābācijiyyalaku
taḷakaṁṭidēvistānaṁlōni pālu dinālu 10 valnānu
nēmu nalaṁdaru vāricēta puccukunna
prati 20 krayaṁ rāyavaṭa 100 nnu
rāya ṁ kunnudi 6 Āṟu

nalaṁjaḷavāricētabuccukoni yi
ccinadi na 1 kinni celleyaṭṭuvaṁṭi sthānaṁ
vāritōṭi pāluvaccina graharāma
kṣētrālu dhanadhāṁnyālu paṁccalōhā
lu jīvadhanamu sahitamugānu dēvi va
rusa pūjasēsi Anubhaviṁcuvāṁḍu
nēmu nalaṁda vāri ṭina Ācaṁdrā
dityulu galaṁtta gālamunnu bhūmi
nni Ākāśamunnu galaṁta gālamunnu ku
laparvvatālu samudrālu galaṁtta gā
lamunnu cellēṭaṭṭugānu yistimi vija
yanaku jellu varusa dināna

dinālunnu nalaṁdaḷu vāriki Ācaṁdrā
rkkasthāyigānu bhūmiṁni Ākāśamu
nnu kulaparvvatālunnu samudrālunnu kalaṁ
ttagālamunnu celleEṭṭugānu yistimi vā
ru 10 dinālu Āṟiṁṭikiṁnni sthānaṁ vāri
tōṭi maryēdalōnanu vaccinaṭuvaṁṭṭi gruharā
makṣētrāluṁnnu dhanadhānyālunnu jīva
dhanamu sahitamugānu vaccinaṭuvaṁ
ṭi pāluvaṁppudēvini pūjasēsi Anubhaviṁ
ccuvāru yīśāsanaṁ pratirāgi śāsanālu vrāsi
vunnavi yi śāsanāku sākṣulu rāmēsvaraṁ
sthānapatulunnu daṁḍūri ceṁgamareḍḍi ko
ḍuku pōtireḍḍinni taḷakaṁṭṭidēviguḍi sthānādhipa
tiyai laṁdaḷajiyyatānu vijayanānu
vīrala vubhayānmatālanu dānavula
pāṭi karaṇaṁ cinarājunarahari ko
Digital edition of SII 37.228 by automatically converted to DHARMA conventions.
